calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-26-2022 Vacated

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2021 Set For Trial On Jul-05-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PHILIP A. SEGAL, Esq. of Kern Segal & Murray (Tel: 562-451-6200) appearing as movant/attorney-of-record for plaintiff Khayree Thomas);
Plaintiff KHAYREE THOMAS (Tel: 510-520-0934) present.

HEARING RE: ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF KHAYREE THOMAS.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

The Court requests that counsel assist in removing obstacles to Mr. Thomas' attempts to obtain new counsel and to inform Mr. Thomas on how he may request a further extension of the jurisdictional period for arbitration.

The Court instructs counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicil Council form and to email the proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. The Court indicates the order will not take effect until it has been served on Mr. Thomas (which may be by whichever method of service is preferred by Mr. Thomas).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
